## Problem

Describe the defect, ambiguity, implementation need, evaluation finding, or governance gap addressed by this change.

## Change

Explain what changed and identify the affected specification sections, requirements, schemas, profiles, code, tests, fixtures, evidence, or documentation.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Requires migration
- [ ] Intentionally incompatible
- [ ] Not applicable

Explain any versioning or migration implications.

## Governance and risk analysis

Address applicable authority, evidence, consequence, affected-party visibility, human-review, remedy, privacy, retention, security, and failure-containment implications.

## Validation

List the commands, tests, conformance vectors, synthetic cases, or review methods used.

```text
Paste concise results here.
```

## Claim boundary

- [ ] This change does not represent adoption, certification, accreditation, external audit, legal compliance, or regulatory approval.
- [ ] Any conformance statement identifies the candidate profile and version tested.
- [ ] Confidential, personal, credential, and private-key data have been excluded.

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `GOVERNANCE.md`.
- [ ] I updated tests or conformance vectors for executable behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when the change is notable.
- [ ] I identified modified generated artifacts and their source inputs.
- [ ] I followed `SECURITY.md` for security-sensitive findings.
